snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ­şæÇ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter Ôû║ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram Ôû║https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-┬¡filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

snippet.description:
Yuvarathnaa , An Kannada and Telugu film from the hit trio Puneeth Rajkumar, Santhosh Ananddram & Hombale Films.

A government aided college, RK University, is on the verge of completing its golden jubilee but a bizarre event shuts it down indefinitely. Will RK University restore its lost glory?


Movie Name: Yuvarathnaa
Produced by: Vijay Kiragandur 
Production House : Hombale Films
Story, Written & Directed by : Santhosh Ananddram
Cast : Puneeth Rajkumar, Sayyeshaa Saigal, Dhananjaya, Prakash Raj, Diganth, Sonu Gowda, Tharak Ponnappa, Vishal Hegde, Avinash, Prakash Belawadi, Sai Kumar, Sudharani and others.

Óñ©ÓÑêÓñòÓñíÓñ╝ÓÑïÓñé Óñ£Óñ╣Óñ¥Óñ£Óñ╝ Óñ¡ÓÑéÓñ«ÓñğÓÑıÓñ» Óñ©Óñ¥ÓñùÓñ░ ÓñòÓÑï Óñ▓Óñ¥Óñ▓ Óñ©Óñ¥ÓñùÓñ░ Óñ©ÓÑç Óñ£ÓÑïÓñíÓñ╝Óñ¿ÓÑç ÓñÁÓñ¥Óñ▓ÓÑÇ ÓñçÓñ© Óñ¿Óñ╣Óñ░ Óñ©ÓÑç ÓñùÓÑüÓñ£Óñ╝Óñ░Óñ¿ÓÑç ÓñòÓñ¥ ÓñçÓñéÓññÓñ£Óñ╝Óñ¥Óñ░ ÓñòÓñ░ Óñ░Óñ╣ÓÑç Óñ╣ÓÑêÓñé. snippet.title: King - Godfather | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Ô£à­şöÑFollow­şñ┤­şÅ¥On Instagram­şöÑÔ£à
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking


LYRICS:

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.

Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

Verse1

Main muh utha ke seedha falak nu chumma,
Aaj aane ki ni lod mera naam thaave dhumma,
Munda jawani vich pair rakheya ni poora,
Ghar baar chhadd kalla shehr wich ghumma.
Milla ni mennu kadde koi godfather,
Na koi achhi salah na yara  koi seekh!!
Lo aaj baneya main apna hi father
Mere saare dukh dard maine aapayi karna theek!!

Maine jeetne di aadat ni paali,
Mere jeen da tareeka yara mere ton vi jada dheet!
Fuckk!!! main kadde jooth ni gaana,
Taj meri maa ae baaki thalle aa zamana

Jo mujhe ghaav dere sadiyon se kehte tere apne hain...aaj maine suna ni bahana!!


HOOK

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.
Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

Verse2

Ekko cheez sikhayi sada zindagi hai maa ne
Putt aage badh pichhe vekhi na,
Jo hoya chhad de o beet gaya,
Tu duniya daari de ghulamma baare jada sochi na.
Ye duniya ghutne bhi tek degi
Tu bas maarke ye ghum zinda baatein likhe ja
Imtehaan aur upar wale ka hai rishta purana
Azmaaye tujhe aage dikhe ja.


Dhokebaazaan naal baithke ni khana Kadde baaki mere putt sada mauja lutti ja!
Fuckk!!! main kadde jooth ni gaana,
Taj meri maa ae baaki thalle aa zamana
Jo mujhe ghaav dere sadiyon se kehte tere apne hain...aaj maine suna ni bahana!!

HOOK

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.

Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Living on Rs 1000 for 24 HOURS Challenge | Mumbai Food Challenge
snippet.description:
Living on rs 1000 for 24 hours challenge !
It's Food Challenge in Mumbai !! Living on rs 100 for 24 hours challenge, Living on rs 50 for 24 hours challenge, Living on rs 10 for 24 hours challenge, Living on rs 200 for 24 hours challenge and Living on rs 2000 for 24 hours challenge was entertaining so i did a new challenge where I survived the entire food challenge by eating indian food in my eating challenge for 1000 rupees. I have consumed more than five varieties of food in this challenge.

snippet.title: Suez Canal | How will Blocked Ship get out? | Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
In the 150 year history of Suez Canal, it is the first time that a blockade like this has happened. Why did the Ever Given ship get stuck in the Suez Canal and what is being done to take it out? I explain all this in this video and the importance of Suez and Panama canals in the global trade today. I also explain why ship traffic is stuck behind the Suez Canal and they have a dilemma. Should they wait it out or should they take the route through the Cape of Good hope in South Africa.

Episode 3134: What Is Tapu Sena's Plan?
---------------------------------------------------------
Tapu Sena has a samosa party at Gogi's house. while having a samosa party Gogi pranks Tapu Sena. after their party they go to the society compound and there they meet Popatlal. Popatlal invites Tapu Sena to his house for dinner on Sunday but they deny it as they get only Sanday to spend time with their full Family. Popatlal feels sad for not having family so Tapu Sena plans to Surprise Popatlal. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Kinne Saalan Baad Lyrics:


Ohi teri gallan ne 
Ohi sawaal ne 
Naina che aaj vi tere 
Ohi pyar ae

Bacheyaan wangu jive, 
Ladi si pehlan tu.. 
Aaj vi sajna tera..
Ohi haal hai ...

Sach vi supna jeha 
Lagda ae... 
Aaj menu London vi Jalandar jeha 
Lagda ae.. 

Kinne Saalan Baad ..
Diseyan menu tu...
Aaj pher pyar hogaya... 

Kinne Saalan Baad ..
Diseyan menu tu...
Aaj pher pyar hogaya... 

Noor tera aaj vi 
Chand toh sonaa ae 
Sadgi che teri main ...
Kudh nu pironaa ae 

Naina ne aaj mere 
Has has rona hai 
Tere warga koi 
Hor naiyo hona ae..

Sach vi supna jeha 
Lagda ae... 
Aaj menu London vi Jalandar jeha 
Lagda ae.. 

Kinne Saalan Baad ..
Diseyan menu tu...
Aaj pher pyar hogaya...

Diseyan menu tu...
Aaj pher pyar hogaya

snippet.title: MAGO | Jasmine Sandlas | Official Music Video (Explicit) | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021|
snippet.description:
#MAGO  #JasmineSandlas #LatestPunjabiSong2021

Song Name: MAGO
Lyrics and Singer: Jasmine Sandlas
Director: Rosleen Sandlas
Music: Sharan Shergill & Lil Daku
Mixing & Mastering: Sharan Shergill
DOP & Editor: Guri Bhandal
Colorist: Gobindpuriya
Makeup: Mia Lopez
Artwork: Pawan Lubana

A big shoutout to the ACAMPO STORE!

Available on all Digital Platforms:

Apple Music: https://rb.gy/3hvw0h
Spotify: https://rb.gy/yzkndw
Amazon Music: https://rb.gy/elgwvj
JioSaavn : https://rb.gy/4fqcrp
Gaana: https://rb.gy/jd8scn

Lyrics:
Pull up in the spot in slow mo
Cash flow, lay low, on the top floor
My click is tight, we same old 
Kehnde chaal navabi nale nakhra doabi

In Bollywood, I'm newbie
You love me coz I'm choosy
My life is like a movie
Lately been speaking rupee

So tell me what you want, what you want soneya 
Yea i got it all, got it all soneya
I'm fly with a motherfuckin cherry on top
You aint sayin nothin, DJ turn it up 

All the way, turn in up all the way 
Mitro aa gayi oye 

Gulabi queen in the house now
Looks like its gonna be a shut down
Straight outta Cali 209
I'd be in Punjab at sundown

Aj di raat to baad, sharabi sada naam hi rakhta javega
Fuck it
Je tu dave mera saath, te aj di eh raat zamana dohravega

So tell me what you want, what you want soneya 
Yea i got it all, got it all soneya
I'm fly with a motherfuckin cherry on top
You aint sayin nothin, DJ turn it up 

All the way, turn in up all the way 
Mitro aa gayi oye 

Paya market vich gaah soneya
Godde Godde sareyan nu chaa soneya
Jide naal hove dhuron hi khuda soneya
Kaun rokda tufana de ve raah so

Sona heere moti paisa channa kithe le java
Yes ! I'm the boss baby. I call the shots baby.
Waiting for no body, let me know that you're ready.

Lakk patla patta di bhari, Agayi Oye
Let's get this party started, Agayi Oye
Aj laal mein surkhi la layi
Alcohol rakho jaari 

Mitro aa gayi oye

Episode 3133: Babita Invites Gada Family On Dinner
---------------------------------------------------------
As there is no gas cylinder at Jethalal's home, Bapu Ji, Jethalal and Tapu decide to out for dinner as Bapu Ji and Jethalal reached the society compound they find Babita coming to their place to give them rusgulla. Babita finds out about their situation of dinner so she invites them to her house for dinner. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Genius TRAVEL HACKS You Need to Know Before YOUR NEXT TRIP
snippet.description:
Unbelievable traveling tips and that will change your life
We gain a lot of experiences when we travel. We get to see new places, have fun and discover new things weÔÇÖve never seen before. But, we all know how stressful traveling can be, and today weÔÇÖve got the solution for you. WeÔÇÖll show you some brilliant hacks and ideas that will make your adventures ten times easier. 
-         Rolling two suitcases at the same time can be very difficult, but you can connect them together with some cling film and carry them at the same time. 
-         If you canÔÇÖt fit your jacket in your backpack, place it inside a garbage bag and vacuum seal it. When you remove all the air from the bag, it will get smaller.
-         Never keep all your money in one place; hide some of them in different places ÔÇô like the inside of your hairbrush. 
 
Timestamps:
2:16 ÔÇô How to pack your jewelry
3:56 ÔÇô Turn a shoulder bag into a backpack
6:26 ÔÇô Genius packing tips
8:52 ÔÇô If you want to sleep on the plane, try this trick

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: Spadikam 26th Year Special Video | Mohanlal | Thilakan | Bhadran | Linto Kurian
snippet.description:
Spadikam 26th year special video

Spadikam is a 1995 Indian Malayalam-language action drama film written and directed by Bhadran and produced by R. Mohan through Shogun Films. Dialogues were written by Rajendra Babu. The film stars Mohanlal and features Thilakan, Urvashi, Spadikam George, K. P. A. C. Lalitha, Rajan P. Dev, Silk Smitha, Nedumudi Venu, Chippy, and V. K. Sreeraman in supporting roles. S. P. Venkatesh composed the film's original songs and background score.

The film tells the story of Thomas Chacko (Mohanlal), who is known by the sobriquet Aadu Thoma, a young ruffian estranged from his narcissistic father, Chacko Mash (Thilakan), upon failing to meet the latter's high expectations. Spadikam received critical acclaim and was one of the highest-grossing Malayalam film of the year, grossing more than Ôé╣5 crore at the box office. Mohanlal won the Kerala State Film Award for Best Actor, at the Filmfare Awards South, the film won Best Film ÔÇô Malayalam, Best Actor (Mohanlal) and Best Director awards. The film was remade in Telugu, Tamil, and Kannada languages.

Softwares Used : Final Cut Pro X, After Effects
Edited by : Linto Kurian
Thumbnail Design : Abhishek P
Facebook : https://m.facebook.com/linto.kurian.54
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/linto_kurian/

snippet.title: Shakti | ÓñÂÓñòÓÑıÓññÓñ┐ | Episode 1205 & 1206 | Recap
snippet.description:
Heer confronts Virat and confesses her feelings that she wants to part ways with him. However, Virat rebukes her for this decision and refuses to end their relationship. Will Virat and Heer's relationship come to an end?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

The accuracy, completeness, currency and/or suitability of the above video description is not endorsed by its licensor or broadcaster or the Channel. They shall not be liable for loss and/or damage arising from the video description.

Born in a small village in Neeleswaram in Kasaragod district, Abhirami Ashok Yadav or Aami Ashokan is a YouTuber and Influencer. Aami's family has been struggling financially. Aami's father was a perfect alcoholic and used to beat up her mother almost all the days. Seeing this every day, Aami Ashokan longed for a better tomorrow. Aami's family was devastated by her father's untimely death. Aami Ashokan's marriage comes at a time when she's going through a difficult time with her mentally exhausted mother and unemployed brother. But then Aami had to get a divorce from that marriage. But the locals around her started calling names by that time. Aami Ashokan kept getting bad comments while making and posting videos on Tik-Tok. But despite that, she continued to work hard. Aami's videos were later uploaded to YouTube and the audience started liking her. Although there are still people who comment very badly on her personal life, Aami Ashokan is an influencer and YouTuber who earns over a lakh rupees today. Today's Aami's life is the good days she dreamed of then.

If you found this episode of Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box. What are your dreams for a better tomorrow? Share with Josh Talks Malayalam.

Watch Aami Ashokan's YouTube channel here:

Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. It aims to inspire and motivate Malayalees by showcasing Malayalam motivation through the experiences of fellow Malayalis. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, womenÔÇÖs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

Born in a small village in Neeleswaram in Kasaragod district, Abhirami Ashok Yadav or Aami Ashokan is a YouTuber and Influencer. Aami's family has been struggling financially. Aami's father was a perfect alcoholic and used to beat up her mother almost all the days. Seeing this every day, Aami Ashokan longed for a better tomorrow. Aami's family was devastated by her father's untimely death. Aami Ashokan's marriage comes at a time when she's going through a difficult time with her mentally exhausted mother and unemployed brother. But then Aami had to get a divorce from that marriage. But the locals around her started calling names by that time. Aami Ashokan kept getting bad comments while making and posting videos on Tik-Tok. But despite that, she continued to work hard. Aami's videos were later uploaded to YouTube and the audience started liking her. Although there are still people who comment very badly on her personal life, Aami Ashokan is an influencer and YouTuber who earns over a lakh rupees today. Today's Aami's life is the good days she dreamed of then.

If you found this episode of Josh Talks Malayalam helpful, please like and share it immediately; Let us know your comments via the comment box. What are your dreams for a better tomorrow? Share with Josh Talks Malayalam.

Watch Aami Ashokan's YouTube channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCi1oMmvSnRvQQxybv9nLxiQ


Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Malayalam caters to the Malayalam speaking audience worldwide. It aims to inspire and motivate Malayalees by showcasing Malayalam motivation through the experiences of fellow Malayalis. Josh talks Malayalam brings to you the best Malayalam motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, womenÔÇÖs rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 9 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the setbacks they face in their career and helping them discover their true calling in life.

snippet.title: Beintehaa | Óñ¼ÓÑçÓñçÓñéÓññÓñ╣Óñ¥ | Episode 30 | Aaliya Makes A New Beginning | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Osman promises to Surraiya to get Zain on the righteous path. Surraiya promises that she will make sure that Zain demands a divorce. Chand Bibi assures Aaliya that Zain will accept her eventually.


The series revolves around the lives of Zain and Aliya, two lovers whose families are sworn enemies. What happens when the past of your family members haunts your future with your loved one? Can real love triumph over family rivalry?

snippet.title: Swaragini | Óñ©ÓÑıÓñÁÓñ░Óñ¥ÓñùÓñ┐Óñ¿ÓÑÇ | Episode 183 | Swara Wants To Reveal Ragini's Truth | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Swara warns Laksh and Ragini that she will reveal the truth. Ragini tries to convince Swara to give Laksh a second chance. Sanskaar explains the consequences to Swara and gives her a solution.


'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?


#Swaragini #ColorsRishtey #Voot

Episode 3132: Taarak helps Jethalal
---------------------------------------------------------
Taarak offers to help Jethalal in lifting the cylinder. Jethalal and Taarak together lift the cylinder and take it to Babita's house. While taking that cylinder to Babita's house, Taarak and Jethalal have an argument between them. Afterward, Jethalal fits the cylinder to the stove. Iyer comes to his house and is shocked after seeing Jethalal over there. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
